case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. PATRICK KIMBLEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 760-14TH ST. #12, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT , ORDER JUDGMENT OF OCT-15-2004 SET ASIDE
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGUILIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 760 14TH STREET, #12, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF MARGULIES, JEFFREY EVAN ON APR-11-2005 THROUGH APR-18-2005 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $46.77 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBLEY, PATRICK
